title: India flags slower growth, wider deficit as Iran war raises the stakes for New Delhi
summary_full: India warns growth may slow as the Iran conflict pushes up energy costs, widens deficits, and strains supply chains.
summary_public: India warns growth may slow as the Iran conflict pushes up energy costs, widens deficits, and strains supply chains.
